hero.subtitle1: Palakasin ang inyong negosyo sa world-class na software
hero.subtitle2: Maaasahan, madaling gamitin at natutugunan ang lahat ng pangangailangan

services.heading: Mga Serbisyo
services.description: Nagbibigay kami ng komprehensibong serbisyo mula sa konsultasyon hanggang suporta
services.dev_desc: Nagdidisenyo at nagde-develop ng custom na software para sa Web, Mobile at Desktop
services.rental_desc: Abot-kayang software rental para sa lahat ng negosyo
services.consult_desc: Konsultasyon sa IT, pagpaplano ng sistema at rekomendasyon sa teknolohiya
services.mobile_desc: Pag-develop ng mobile app para sa iOS at Android
services.web_desc: Idinisenyo at na-develop ang lahat ng uri ng website
services.db_desc: Pagdidisenyo at pagpapanatili ng database system

photobooth.description: Serbisyo ng pagpapaupa ng Korean-style photobooth na may sariling software
photobooth.feature3: Mga frame na ina-update bawat buwan
photobooth.feature4: Para sa lahat ng laki ng event
photobooth.feature5: On-site na suporta sa buong event

showcase.heading: Portfolio
showcase.description: Mga halimbawang proyekto na aming pinaunlad para sa mga kliyente
showcase.project0_desc: Pamamahala ng back-office at ulat sa benta
showcase.project1_desc: Aplikasyon ng pagpapa-queue para sa klinika
showcase.project2_desc: Kumpletong online na platform ng benta
showcase.project3_desc: Sistema ng HR para sa mga negosyo
showcase.project0_detail: A complete photobooth software solution designed to handle events of all sizes, from small gatherings to large corporate events.
showcase.project0_features: Automated photo capture, Frame & Filter management, Sales reporting, Instant photo printing, Multi-channel payments, Back-office dashboard
showcase.project1_detail: A back-office system that enables teams to manage sales data, reports and analytics efficiently, directly connected to the photobooth system with real-time data display.
showcase.project1_features: Real-time dashboard, Daily/monthly sales reports, User management, Export to Excel/PDF, Smart notifications, Data backup system
showcase.project2_detail: An enterprise hub platform consolidating task management, HR, and organizational resources into one place.
showcase.project2_features: Task management, HR & Leave management, Internal chat, Document management, Performance reporting, Single Sign-On
showcase.project3_detail: A full-featured online sales platform supporting both B2C and B2B with product management, inventory, order handling, and secure payment processing.
showcase.project3_features: Advanced product management, Shopping cart & payments, Order management, Promotions system, Sales reports, Product reviews

contact.description: Ang aming koponan ng mga eksperto ay handang makinig at magbigay ng payo
contact.form_subtitle: Punan ang impormasyon sa ibaba at makikipag-ugnayan kami sa inyo

footer.description: Mga espesyalista sa photobooth software na nag-aalok ng buong serbisyo
